source_meaning: hereafter, in future, in the future, for the future
target_meaning: A and B, former and latter

source_meaning: to travel extensively (to different parts of the world), to be constantly on the move
target_meaning: Literally, “to have wide feet”; to be a social butterfly, to know a lot of people

source_idiom: zu etwas kommen wie die Jungfrau zum Kind
target_meaning: something that happens to someone who is thought to deserve it; something that serves someone right
the sky is clear, and the horses are strong and well-fed
to be overflowing, to be extremely numerous, to be endless

source_idiom: Zwerg auf den Schultern von Riesen
source_meaning: dwarf standing on the shoulders of giants
target_meaning: "a marten that hunts tigers"; a David before a Goliath
